items.title: S01E01 - Open Government
items.summary: Jim Hacker retains his seat in the election and is given a cabinet post in the new government He meets the permanent secretary for his department Sir Humphrey Appleby but Jim decides to change the way things are done in the civil service so Sir Humphrey sets out to stop him

infolabels.title: Open Government
infolabels.plot: Jim Hacker retains his seat in the election and is given a cabinet post in the new government He meets the permanent secretary for his department Sir Humphrey Appleby but Jim decides to change the way things are done in the civil service so Sir Humphrey sets out to stop him

items.title: S01E02 - The Official Visit
items.summary: When the leader of an African country is killed in a coup, his successor, who is an old friend of Jim’s, comes in his place. They negotiate a £50 million deal to help buy oil exploration equipment.

infolabels.title: The Official Visit
infolabels.plot: When the leader of an African country is killed in a coup, his successor, who is an old friend of Jim’s, comes in his place. They negotiate a £50 million deal to help buy oil exploration equipment.

items.title: S01E03 - The Economy Drive
items.summary: Jim Hacker is determined to reduce the Civil Service, but he is frustrated by Sir Humphrey, and the only numbers he can alter are the numbers of tea ladies.

infolabels.title: The Economy Drive
infolabels.plot: Jim Hacker is determined to reduce the Civil Service, but he is frustrated by Sir Humphrey, and the only numbers he can alter are the numbers of tea ladies.

items.title: S01E04 - Big Brother
items.summary: When the Government is planning to introduce a national database, Jim wants to bring in safe guards, but Sir Humphrey stalls until with some help from the opposition, Jim gets his way.

infolabels.title: Big Brother
infolabels.plot: When the Government is planning to introduce a national database, Jim wants to bring in safe guards, but Sir Humphrey stalls until with some help from the opposition, Jim gets his way.

items.title: S01E05 - The Writing on the Wall
items.summary: A rumour starts that Jim’s department is about to be axed. So with help from Sir Humphrey, they try and defeat the Prime Minister’s plans.

infolabels.title: The Writing on the Wall
infolabels.plot: A rumour starts that Jim’s department is about to be axed. So with help from Sir Humphrey, they try and defeat the Prime Minister’s plans.

items.title: S01E06 - The Right to Know
items.summary: Jim faces rebellion at home and in the office over the removal of protected status from a badger habitat, while he tries to circumvent Sir Humphrey’s efforts to keep him ignorant of things.

infolabels.title: The Right to Know
infolabels.plot: Jim faces rebellion at home and in the office over the removal of protected status from a badger habitat, while he tries to circumvent Sir Humphrey’s efforts to keep him ignorant of things.

items.title: S01E07 - Jobs for the Boys
items.summary: Jim goes on radio to support the Solihull project a Government, union and private enterprise building scheme, that he has inherited from the last administration, but unknown to him the project is close to bankruptcy, Sir Humphrey hopes to save the deal by offering a quango to the director of the bank involved

infolabels.title: Jobs for the Boys
infolabels.plot: Jim goes on radio to support the Solihull project a Government, union and private enterprise building scheme, that he has inherited from the last administration, but unknown to him the project is close to bankruptcy, Sir Humphrey hopes to save the deal by offering a quango to the director of the bank involved

items.title: S02E01 - The Compassionate Society
items.summary: When Jim learns that a brand new hospital still has no medical staff, but hundreds of civil servants working there, he proposes that half of the civil servants be sacked and use the money saved to open wards with medical staff.

infolabels.title: The Compassionate Society
infolabels.plot: When Jim learns that a brand new hospital still has no medical staff, but hundreds of civil servants working there, he proposes that half of the civil servants be sacked and use the money saved to open wards with medical staff.

items.title: S02E02 - Doing the Honours
items.summary: When Jim learns that he can block civil servant’s honours, he blackmails them into cutting their budgets, but when he hears that he might be in line for an honorary degree, he has to back down.

infolabels.title: Doing the Honours
infolabels.plot: When Jim learns that he can block civil servant’s honours, he blackmails them into cutting their budgets, but when he hears that he might be in line for an honorary degree, he has to back down.

items.title: S02E03 - The Death List
items.summary: When Jim learns that when in opposition he was bugged by the secret service, he decides to bring in legislation to kerb the bugging, only to find out that he is on the death list of a group of terrorists, and the best way to find them, is by bugging phone lines.

infolabels.title: The Death List
infolabels.plot: When Jim learns that when in opposition he was bugged by the secret service, he decides to bring in legislation to kerb the bugging, only to find out that he is on the death list of a group of terrorists, and the best way to find them, is by bugging phone lines.

items.title: S02E04 - The Greasy Pole
items.summary: Jim has the chance of creating jobs, and saving a chemical company, when they are offered the chance to manufacture a highly dangerous chemical, but when the news gets out that it might be too dangerous, he has to back down.

infolabels.title: The Greasy Pole
infolabels.plot: Jim has the chance of creating jobs, and saving a chemical company, when they are offered the chance to manufacture a highly dangerous chemical, but when the news gets out that it might be too dangerous, he has to back down.

items.title: S02E05 - The Devil You Know
items.summary: When Jim is betrayed by a Cabinet colleague over his plans to bring in jobs for British workers, he thinks about leaving Westminster and becoming a European Commissioner, But when Sir Humphrey learns who his replacement will be, he tries to change Jim’s mind.

infolabels.title: The Devil You Know
infolabels.plot: When Jim is betrayed by a Cabinet colleague over his plans to bring in jobs for British workers, he thinks about leaving Westminster and becoming a European Commissioner, But when Sir Humphrey learns who his replacement will be, he tries to change Jim’s mind.

items.title: S02E06 - The Quality of Life
items.summary: Sir Humphrey uses Jim’s promise to keep a popular city farm project open to get special permission for an additional nine floors on a proposed skyscraper.

infolabels.title: The Quality of Life
infolabels.plot: Sir Humphrey uses Jim’s promise to keep a popular city farm project open to get special permission for an additional nine floors on a proposed skyscraper.

items.title: S02E07 - A Question of Loyalty
items.summary: Jim and Sir Humphrey pass the buck to protect each other when they appear before a select committee investigating charges of waste in Hacker’s ministry, until Jim’s higher loyalties are called upon.

infolabels.title: A Question of Loyalty
infolabels.plot: Jim and Sir Humphrey pass the buck to protect each other when they appear before a select committee investigating charges of waste in Hacker’s ministry, until Jim’s higher loyalties are called upon.

items.title: S03E01 - Equal Opportunities
items.summary: Jim decides to promote more women to high civil service positions despite Sir Humphrey’s opposition.

infolabels.title: Equal Opportunities
infolabels.plot: Jim decides to promote more women to high civil service positions despite Sir Humphrey’s opposition.

items.title: S03E02 - The Challenge
items.summary: When Jim tackles local council administration and civil defence, he runs afoul of a B.B.C. interviewer.

infolabels.title: The Challenge
infolabels.plot: When Jim tackles local council administration and civil defence, he runs afoul of a B.B.C. interviewer.

items.title: S03E03 - The Skeleton in the Cupboard
items.summary: Jim uses a costly mistake from Sir Humphrey’s past to escape chastising an efficient local council for being late with their paperwork.

infolabels.title: The Skeleton in the Cupboard
infolabels.plot: Jim uses a costly mistake from Sir Humphrey’s past to escape chastising an efficient local council for being late with their paperwork.

items.title: S03E04 - The Moral Dimension
items.summary: Jim is forced to back down about exposing bribery used to obtain a lucrative foreign contract when Bernard allows a valuable vase from a foreign government to be undervalued so that Mrs Hacker can keep it.

infolabels.title: The Moral Dimension
infolabels.plot: Jim is forced to back down about exposing bribery used to obtain a lucrative foreign contract when Bernard allows a valuable vase from a foreign government to be undervalued so that Mrs Hacker can keep it.

items.title: S03E05 - The Bed of Nails
items.summary: Jim accepts an unpopular position pushing a transportation bill desired by Number 10, but opposed by everyone else.

infolabels.title: The Bed of Nails
infolabels.plot: Jim accepts an unpopular position pushing a transportation bill desired by Number 10, but opposed by everyone else.

items.title: S03E06 - The Whisky Priest
items.summary: Jim faces opposition from all sides when he learns that British munitions have been sold to terrorist groups and he decides to start an inquiry into how it happened.

infolabels.title: The Whisky Priest
infolabels.plot: Jim faces opposition from all sides when he learns that British munitions have been sold to terrorist groups and he decides to start an inquiry into how it happened.

items.title: S03E07 - The Middle-Class Rip-Off
items.summary: Jim and Sir Humphrey collide when Jim acts as an M.P. to sell an art gallery and museum in his district to support a popular local soccer club.

infolabels.title: The Middle-Class Rip-Off
infolabels.plot: Jim and Sir Humphrey collide when Jim acts as an M.P. to sell an art gallery and museum in his district to support a popular local soccer club.
